divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.consequence: Every bg-primary-main, text-primary-main, focus ring, and Colors.lightTheme.primary[1] consumer is wrong. Nairobi CTA is saturated yellow #FEC931 with dark text on top, not deep orange on white. Yellow appears 85x as solid + 26x at 20% tint.
Header, sidenav, back-button text/icon, and any 'primary[2]' dark accent must rebind to forest green #204F37 (196 hits — the most-used colour in the whole theme). Teal-blue is wrong for Nairobi.

divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.digitUiDefault: (none — DIGIT uses neutral grey for secondary buttons)
divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.consequence: Add a brand-tinted secondary surface token. Secondary buttons in Nairobi sit on a pale forest-green wash, not on neutral.

divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.figmaIntent: 8px (most common, 81 hits) with 12px for cards (45+20 hits) and 4px reserved for tags/inputs (54 hits)
divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.consequence: Cards and buttons must round to 8/12px. The flat 4px DIGIT default makes Nairobi cards look hard-edged. DIGIT 04 column also leans on 8px.

divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.figmaIntent: Inter (216 hits Inter vs 29 leftover Roboto vs 7 SF Pro Text iOS-status-bar)
divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.consequence: Swap @font-face, Tailwind fontFamily.sans, and SCSS $body-font from Roboto to Inter. The 29 Roboto hits in the dump are stale legacy DIGIT components dragged into the canvas.
Drop existing Material elevation; cards use a single 1-px shadow. Buttons add a stronger 0px 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) for press affordance.

divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.figmaIntent: #191C1D for body, #787878 for helper, #363636 for form labels
divergencesFromDigitUiDefault.consequence: Replace single text-primary token with a 3-token text scale (body-strong / helper / form-label). #0B0C0C only appears 7 times in Nairobi as the Light-Theme/text-color-primary style — kept for compat but not the canonical body colour.
